message: I inject the one with a higher concentration into her somewhat bewildered hands.
She lets out a small sound, 'huh,' at the moment the needle pierces her skin and turns her face away.
Does it hurt? I ask.
Nah, I'm okay.
She tries to show off her toughness.
I never thought things would go this smoothly. I mean, who would have thought she'd just go along with it?
But all I did was show up.
She just said she wanted to try the drug.
Yet her face reveals a complex expression mixed with regret and pain.
She must surely be regretting it.
That this wasn't how it was supposed to be.
Now her whole body is relaxed, drooling from her slackened mouth.
Downer drugs make your whole body lose strength, resulting in this state.
A terribly ugly sight that is incompatible with her saintly, gentle face.
If I were to slit her throat, it would result in a sloppy expression.
Such anxieties crossed my mind.
But her face is smiling blissfully, leading me to conclude everything is fine.
Her white, delicate, slumped neck was beautiful.
I take out a brand new scalpel and set my sights on her throat.
I slide the blade into her beautiful skin and quickly sever her neck.
That's it, it's finally over.
At last, everything has come to an end.
God, I can finally say I've fulfilled my mission.
